details.baseline_response: Could not parse input: 429 You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits.

all_results.remediation:
1. JSON-escape all user input before embedding in LLM prompts    (use json.dumps(user_text) not f-strings).
2. Validate LLM output against your expected schema — if it diverges,    log and discard rather than returning the error to the client.
3. Use a separate validation LLM call to check the structured output    before storing it.
4. Never expose raw LLM exception messages to end users.
